---
title: "AI Research Assistant"
---

Chat with an AI trained on the PEX26-F51L scientific literature, including the original
discovery paper and all citing publications. The assistant answers questions based strictly
on the uploaded research papers and cites its sources.

[💬 Open Research Assistant](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/6c5550cb-f1e7-475b-89b1-9422fa615f96/preview){target="_blank"}
